briefs.title: Council to Consider 30+ Unfinished 2024 Resolutions: Development, Housing & Safety
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to review a list of over 30 resolutions from 2024 that are still in progress or not yet started — covering topics like new housing developments, fire safety bylaws, water metering, and earthquake preparedness. Many of these items are still being worked on by city staff and have not yet been finalized or enacted.
briefs.action_required: Track specific resolutions affecting your business — especially rezoning, development charges, or bylaw changes — and watch for Council updates.
